📍 View on Maps 🌐 Temple Emmanuel

Methodology

Data Source: Sentinel-2 L2A multispectral imagery (10m resolution) from the ESA Copernicus program, accessed via the Element84 Earth Search STAC API.

Analysis Period: Baseline scene Sept 1, 2023 vs. comparison scene Aug 31, 2025 — both with near-zero cloud cover (<0.01%).

Detection Method: NDVI (Normalized Difference Vegetation Index) change detection. Vegetated pixels (NDVI ≥ 0.4) compared across the two dates. Decline thresholds: Moderate >10% loss, Severe >20% loss. Adjacent decline pixels clustered using scipy connected-component labeling.

Contact Enrichment: Decision-maker data sourced from Apollo.io and Clay.com, March 2026. Email addresses verified where noted.

MetricValue

Severe Decline (>20%)2,904 (3.75%)
